314 GG0130E3_BTHE_SELF_END_CD GG0130E3_BTHE_SELF_END_CD GG0130E3 Discharge Performance Bathing Code - The data in this column indicates the patient's ability with bathing/showering at the time of discharge. CHAR 2 The data in this column indicates the patient's ability with bathing/shower at the time of discharge. 01 = Dependent
02 = Substantial/maximal assistance
03 = Partial/moderate assistance
04 = Supervision or touching assistance
